name: opensearch_index_config_expected
description: Expected OpenSearch index configuration for Module 1 scale and memory tests.

settings.number_of_shards_guidance: size shards to keep vector graph memory bounded; start with 12-24 primary shards for 20M chunks and benchmark
settings.number_of_replicas_guidance: 1 replica for HA/read throughput; increase only after memory sizing
settings.refresh_interval: 30s during bulk indexing, 1s or default after ingestion

memory_optimization.quantization: use FAISS byte/vector quantization or model-supported lower-dimensional embeddings after recall benchmark
